svg.title: Hamster working two-session crossed arms v1
svg.desc: Two-session working animation: the hamster crosses its arms, watches alternating session bubbles, taps one foot at a time, and returns to a happy front-facing expression after each output completes.
svg.metadata: {"state":"working","variant":"working-2session","version":"working-2session-crossed-arms-v1","source":"drafts/working-motion-v1/working-2session-v1/hamster-working-2session-crossed-arms-director-spacing-fit-v1.html","finalized":"2026-06-13","durationMs":10400,"notes":["Self-contained scripted SVG: V18 master, balanced session bubbles, crossed-arms PNG, and hand-marked gray line paths are embedded.","The crossed-arms PNG is a final reference patch for this branch; older automatic outline attempts are not used.","Scripted animation may not run when embedded as a plain img; use object/iframe or a trusted scripted SVG runtime."]}

g.title: Hamster flat layered master v18 capsule hands
g.desc: Light-palette layered hamster master with V18 capsule hands: one rounded bar per hand, with the warm paw color as the capsule end segment. Hands sit above the body and tie, below the head and face; character mid-line stays at 187.

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly), revealed by turn pages sliding sideways
